scope: Pixel QA of current strict body-contact masks, actor-hand fallback edge, and per-hand placeholder edges.
review_basis: Active body_contact_slots masks and depth/normal references.

checks.name: fallback_actor_hand_contact_overlap
checks.notes: Fallback actor-hand mask overlaps contact zone with actor_contact_overlap_over_actor=1.0 for butt and breast receiver surfaces.

checks.name: per_hand_left_right_identity
checks.notes: Nodes 1051-1054 are zero/off placeholders; no same-scene left/right hand identity is proven.

checks.name: combined_actor_hand_split_feasibility
checks.notes: Combined actor-hand mask has components but no reliable Character A/B left/right labels, so nonzero split would be speculative.

checks.name: pressure_and_indentation_containment
checks.notes: Pressure and indentation mostly sit inside receiver masks for fallback butt and fully inside broad receiver breast mask; runtime/visual context is still required.

checks.name: depth_occlusion_consistency
checks.notes: Depth luma and occlusion overlap were measured, but absolute foreground/background interpretation requires runtime context and visual review.

checks.name: final_hand_quality
checks.notes: No generated output was reviewed; this is not a hand anatomy acceptance artifact.

limitations: No generated output or crop was visually accepted.
Mask geometry cannot prove final hand anatomy, collision, or deformation quality.
next_action: Use this artifact as Lane 2 pixel-level preflight for Lane 4 runtime validation and Lane 5 QA; replace zero/off per-hand placeholders when same-scene split masks are available.
